title: Define Relationships Worksheet
text: Define Relationships Worksheet Use this worksheet to define the relationships of the current entity, which must have the Many role in a one-to-many relationship. For more information, see Relationships . Tools Resource Browser: Model —find and select the One entity for a relationship. Relationship Editor —graphical editor for defining the relationships and foreign keys in the current entity. How To Define Relationships Between Modeled Entities Using the Uniface IDE Working with Development Objects Related Links Relationships A relationship is an association between one entity and another. It is modeled as a development object belonging to the many-side entity in a one-to-many relationship. Delete Constraint Defines Uniface behavior when an occurrence of the One Entity is deleted, and there are related occurrences of the many entity available in the component data structure. Valid values are Restricted (default), Cascading, or Nullify. Referential Integrity Referential integrity is a standard feature of relational database design that prevents users or applications from entering inconsistent data. Most relational databases have referential integrity rules that you can apply when you create a relationship between tables. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
